decision_reason: Rust/NumPy gates in plan §11 are not met. No production-scale analytics benchmarks or profiler evidence that a numeric kernel exceeds engine deadline by 30%. Correct outcome remains deferral. Reconfirmed 2026-07-11T15:46:00.698459Z.
